args.query: SELECT Id, AccountId, FirstName, LastName FROM Contact WHERE Id LIKE '%Jqy8SIAR%';

exec_args.sql: SELECT Id, AccountId, FirstName, LastName FROM Contact WHERE Id LIKE '%Jqy8SIAR%';

args.query:
SELECT o.Id as OrderId, o.AccountId, o.EffectiveDate, oi.Id as OrderItemId, oi.Product2Id, p.Id as ProductId, p.Name as ProductName, oi.Quantity, oi.UnitPrice
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON oi.OrderId = o.Id
LEFT JOIN Product2 p ON p.Id = oi.Product2Id
WHERE o.AccountId LIKE '%PGXrNIAX%'
AND o.EffectiveDate BETWEEN '2021-06-01' AND '2021-06-30';

exec_args.sql:
SELECT o.Id as OrderId, o.AccountId, o.EffectiveDate, oi.Id as OrderItemId, oi.Product2Id, p.Id as ProductId, p.Name as ProductName, oi.Quantity, oi.UnitPrice
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON oi.OrderId = o.Id
LEFT JOIN Product2 p ON p.Id = oi.Product2Id
WHERE o.AccountId LIKE '%PGXrNIAX%'
AND o.EffectiveDate BETWEEN '2021-06-01' AND '2021-06-30';
